title: Formula Help to calculate Vacation Days Left
excerpt: Hi there. I am totally new to forumlas and hoping someone can help me out. Currently I have a formula that calculates Vacation Days left, based off Total Vacation Hours Left and number of hours in a work day. The formula…

posts.author: bonnie.moore (Bonnie Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there. I am totally new to forumlas and hoping someone can help me out. Currently I have a formula that calculates Vacation Days left, based off Total Vacation Hours Left and number of hours in a work day. The formula is DIVIDE({Vacation Hours Left}, 7.5), which is based off folks working 7.5 hrs a day. This works great, however, the challenge is some folks work 8 hours. I created a column called Work Hours days. Each employee is an item.
Is there a formula that I can use that would divide the vacation hours by the number of Work Hours in a day. And what would that format look like? I tried playing around with the function IF and the column Work Hours, but can’t get it working.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bonnie.moore

Did you try:
DIVIDE({Vacation Hours Left}, {Work Hours})

posts.author: bonnie.moore (Bonnie Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: I did not and that works! Thanks!
